title: Greece — Detailed Statement of Real Estate Rents (Form Ε2), Rented-Out Property Pathway
description: Greece's companion real-estate/rental-income schedule to the annual personal income tax return, "Αναλυτική Κατάσταση Μισθωμάτων Ακίνητης Περιουσίας" (Form Ε2, tax year 2025), served by the Independent Authority for Public Revenue (AADE), adding a second Taxes-vertical schema for Greece alongside gr/aade/dilosi-forologias-eisodimatos-e1-e2-e3 (Form Ε1). The source is AADE's own 3-page Form Ε2 specimen (edition "Φ-01.002 / Έκδοση 2026"): 2 pages present a 19-column analytical table (one row per leased property/tenant/lease-period, columns numbered 1-19) with 10 pre-printed blank rows, and 1 page carries the form's own 12 numbered field-completion instructions. This v1.0.0 scopes to the primary rented-out-to-a-tenant use case: property identification, tenant identification, lease period/duration/rent, co-ownership share, gross income from leasing, uncollected income, the mandatory lease-type/use code (restricted to this schema's 15 in-scope lease/sublease codes out of the source's 67), the property's electricity-supply number, and the companion Declaration-of-Lease-Information registration number — modeled as a bounded 10-property repeating group (property1..property10), matching the specimen's own printed row count, since GovSchema v0.3 has no array/repeating-element type (GSP-0009 remains an unaccepted proposal). Free-of-charge use/gratuitous grant (Δωρεάν παραχώρηση), owner's-own-use (Ιδιοχρησιμοποίηση), the page-2 "Συμπληρωματικά Στοιχεία" co-ownership/sub-lessor supplementary panel, and the page-2 Table ΙΙ for property unfinished/transferred/acquired during the tax year are out of scope for this v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosure and future companion-schema candidates. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Greece or AADE.

source.documentRef: AADE, Form Ε2 "Αναλυτική Κατάσταση Μισθωμάτων Ακίνητης Περιουσίας Φορολογικού Έτους 2025" (Detailed Statement of Real Estate Rents, tax year 2025), edition "Φ-01.002 / Έκδοση 2026"; Wayback Machine mirror, since www.aade.gr is Akamai-403-gated from this sandbox. Companion FAQ: AADE, "Συχνές ερωτήσεις – απαντήσεις για τη συμπλήρωση του Ε2" (Athens, 13 March 2026), via https://web.archive.org/web/20260419183207/https://www.aade.gr/sites/default/files/2026-03/FAQS_E2_13032026.pdf.

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2644, a child of the standing research routine (GOV-2609/GOV-2167). Adds Greece's second Taxes-vertical schema, a companion to gr/aade/dilosi-forologias-eisodimatos-e1-e2-e3 (Form Ε1, GOV-2621/PR #429). The primary www.aade.gr host is Akamai-403-gated from this sandbox, consistent with this registry's established pattern for Greek government hosts. Both the Form Ε2 PDF and its companion FAQ PDF were independently re-fetched this cycle via curl through their Wayback Machine mirrors (exact CDX-confirmed snapshot timestamps): Form Ε2 — HTTP 200, Content-Type application/pdf, 76,961 bytes, sha256 86c0ea9303799e7101c476fa3192bd7fbf2056e1bddeaf58d36ddbdd6ba58cbf; FAQ — HTTP 200, Content-Type application/pdf, 283,557 bytes, sha256 b4f4915bd9a9a3521310352337f870f7bf9db349a227bee8fe73aa79ea57832a — both computed independently via sha256sum on the freshly downloaded files. Parsed with pdfjs-dist@3 (legacy build): Form Ε2 confirmed 3 pages, 6,976 extractable text chars, 0 AcroForm widgets (a static specimen, not a fillable form) across every page; FAQ confirmed 8 pages, 13,049 chars. Both pages 1 and 2 of the Ε2 specimen were additionally rendered to raster images this cycle via pdfjs-dist + node-canvas (2.5x scale) to visually resolve the table geometry that a pure text-position dump could not disambiguate — this directly confirmed page 1 is the primary 19-column analytical table (columns 1-19 running left-to-right, properties as rows) with exactly 10 pre-printed blank data rows before its own ΑΘΡΟΙΣΜΑ (total) line (independently counted via horizontal-divider detection on the rendered raster, confirmed by visual inspection), and that page 2 is a distinct "ΣΥΜΠΛΗΡΩΜΑΤΙΚΑ ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΗΣ ΠΕΡΙΟΥΣΙΑΣ" panel (co-ownership/sub-lessor details, 7 rows) plus a separate Table ΙΙ (unfinished/transferred/acquired property, 4 rows) — both out of scope for this v1.0.0. Page 3's own 12 numbered field-completion instructions and the companion FAQ's 17 numbered Q&As (including its own Q3 67-code ΕΙΔΟΣ ΜΙΣΘΩΣΗΣ-ΧΡΗΣΗ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΟΥ code list) were read directly from the position-sorted text layer, not assumed from any prior summary.

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: Tax year
fields.description: The tax year (φορολογικό έτος) this rent statement covers, e.g. "2025". This source is itself the tax-year-2025 edition ("ΑΝΑΛΥΤΙΚΗ ΚΑΤΑΣΤΑΣΗ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑΤΩΝ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΗΣ ΠΕΡΙΟΥΣΙΑΣ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟΥ ΕΤΟΥΣ 2025").

fields.name: filerTin
fields.label: ΑΦΜ (Taxpayer Identification Number) — filer
fields.description: The filer's 9-digit Greek Tax Identification Number (ΑΦΜ). Per page 3 instruction item 3 and the companion FAQ (Q1/Q7), each spouse/civil partner who separately owns (or co-owns) real estate must submit their own, separate Ε2 — this schema models a single filer's own Ε2.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΥΠΟΧΡΕΟΥ ΦΥΣΙΚΟΥ Ή ΝΟΜΙΚΟΥ ΠΡΟΣΩΠΟΥ Ή ΝΟΜΙΚΗΣ ΟΝΤΟΤΗΤΑΣ

fields.name: filerName
fields.label: Filer's full name (with father's name) or registered company name
fields.description: The filer's full name and father's name (natural person) or registered company name (legal person/legal entity), per the source's single combined box ("ΟΝΟΜΑΤΕΠΩΝΥΜΟ - ΠΑΤΡ. / ΕΠΩΝΥΜΙΑ"), which does not separate these into distinct boxes the way Form Ε1 does.

fields.name: reportingPeriodFrom
fields.label: Reporting period, from
fields.description: The "Από" (From) date box printed at the top of page 1, alongside the form's own Ε2/2025 heading. Neither the form's own 12-item instruction page nor the companion FAQ explains this box's purpose further (e.g. it may denote a partial-year filing); modeled as optional and disclosed as unelaborated in the sources read this cycle.

fields.name: reportingPeriodTo
fields.label: Reporting period, to
fields.description: The "Έως" (To) date box printed at the top of page 1, immediately below reportingPeriodFrom. See reportingPeriodFrom for the same disclosed lack of further source elaboration.

fields.name: submissionNumber
fields.label: Submission number (ΑΡ. ΥΠΟΒΟΛΗΣ)
fields.description: The submission/receipt number assigned by AADE's myAADE e-filing system once this Ε2 is submitted — administration-populated, not applicant-entered at filing time.

fields.name: submissionDate
fields.label: Submission date
fields.description: The date this Ε2 was submitted, assigned by AADE's myAADE e-filing system alongside submissionNumber — administration-populated.

fields.name: accountantDetails
fields.label: Accountant details (if applicable)
fields.description: Free-text details of the accountant (λογιστής) who prepared/co-signed this return on the filer's behalf, if any. The source's own signature block additionally names "Ο ΛΟΓΙΣΤΗΣ" (the accountant) and "Ο/Η ΔΗΛΩΝ/ΟΥΣΑ" (the declarant) as separate signatories (page 1's ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΛΟΓΙΣΤΗ row), but no discrete boolean gates whether an accountant was involved, so this is left optional, disclosed, consistent with this registry's established convention for undocumented representative/advisor blocks (cf. gr/aade's own E1 representativeDetails precedent).

fields.name: property1Location
fields.label: Property 1 — location (address / village-area-postal code)
fields.description: Column 2 (ΤΟΠΟΘΕΣΙΑ): the leased property's street name and number and city, or village/area and postal code. One row of the main analytical rent statement (ΑΝΑΛΥΤΙΚΗ ΚΑΤΑΣΤΑΣΗ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑΤΩΝ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΗΣ ΠΕΡΙΟΥΣΙΑΣ) represents one leased property/tenant/lease-period combination.

fields.name: property1FloorPosition
fields.label: Property 1 — floor / position
fields.description: Column 3 (ΘΕΣΗ): the property's floor or position within the building, e.g. ground floor (ισόγειο), 1st floor, 2nd floor, etc.

fields.name: property1Category
fields.label: Property 1 — category
fields.description: Column 4 (ΚΑΤΗΓ.): the property's category per the source's own illustrative, non-exhaustive list — residence (οικία), single-family home (μονοκατοικία), apartment (διαμέρισμα), shop (κατάστημα), office (γραφείο), plot (οικόπεδο), warehouse (αποθήκη), parking space (χώρος στάθμευσης), land (γαία), etc. (page 3, instruction item 6). Modeled as free text since the source's own list is illustrative ("κ.λπ." / "etc."), not a closed code list.

fields.name: property1AreaSqm
fields.label: Property 1 — area (square metres)
fields.description: Column 5 (ΕΠΙΦΑΝ. σε τ.μ.): the property's floor area in square metres.

fields.name: property1TenantName
fields.label: Property 1 — tenant name / company name
fields.description: Column 6 (ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΤΗ — Ονοματεπώνυμο/Επωνυμία): the tenant's full name (natural person) or company name (legal person/entity) leasing this property.

fields.name: property1TenantTin
fields.label: Property 1 — tenant ΑΦΜ (Tax Identification Number)
fields.description: Column 7 (Αριθμός Φορολογικού Μητρώου — ΑΦΜ): the tenant's 9-digit Greek Tax Identification Number.

fields.name: property1LeaseFrom
fields.label: Property 1 — lease period within tax year 2025, from
fields.description: Column 8 (ΔΙΑΡΚΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΗΣ ΣΤΟ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ 2025 — ΑΠΟ): the start date, within tax year 2025, of the lease period this row covers.

fields.name: property1LeaseTo
fields.label: Property 1 — lease period within tax year 2025, to
fields.description: Column 9 (ΔΙΑΡΚΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΗΣ ΣΤΟ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ 2025 — ΕΩΣ): the end date, within tax year 2025, of the lease period this row covers.

fields.name: property1LeaseMonths
fields.label: Property 1 — lease duration (months)
fields.description: Column 10 (ΜΗΝΕΣ αριθ.): the number of months of the lease period, within tax year 2025, that this row covers.

fields.name: property1MonthlyRent
fields.label: Property 1 — monthly rent (actual or notional)
fields.description: Column 11 (ΠΡΑΓΜΑΤΙΚΟ Ή ΤΕΚΜΑΡΤΟ ΜΗΝΙΑΙΟ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑ): the actual or notional (τεκμαρτό) monthly rent. Per the companion FAQ (Q13), completion of this column is mandatory or not depending on which code is chosen in propertyNLeaseTypeAndUse (e.g. not applicable to a vacant property) — this cross-field condition is disclosed here rather than encoded, since it would require mapping every lease-type code to a rent-applicability flag, out of scope for this v1.0.0.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, column 11 (ΠΡΑΓΜΑΤΙΚΟ Ή ΤΕΚΜΑΡΤΟ ΜΗΝΙΑΙΟ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑ); FAQ Q13

fields.name: property1CoOwnershipPercent
fields.label: Property 1 — co-ownership percentage
fields.description: Column 12 (ΠΟΣΟΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΙΔ/ΣΙΑΣ %): the filer's co-ownership/co-usufruct percentage share of the property, if not sole owner. Per page 3, instruction item 5, the gross-income columns record only the amount proportional to this share.

fields.name: property1GrossIncomeLease
fields.label: Property 1 — gross income from lease/sublease
fields.description: Column 13 (Εκμίσθωση - υπεκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας): the gross (real or notional) income attributable to the filer from leasing or subleasing this property. Per page 3, instruction item 10, the specific gross-income column populated (13, 14, or 15) depends on the property's lease type/use; this v1.0.0 scopes to the rented-out-to-a-tenant case and therefore models only column 13 (see VERIFICATION.md for the disclosed exclusion of columns 14/15).

fields.name: property1GrossIncomeUncollected
fields.label: Property 1 — uncollected income from leasing
fields.description: Column 16 (Ανείσπρακτα εισοδήματα από εκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας): rent that accrued but was not collected. Per the companion FAQ (Q4), this may only be declared once the tax office has issued a decision under Article 39 §4 ν.4172/2013 (per circulars ΠΟΛ.1024/2016, ΠΟΛ.1102/2016, and Α.1062/2026) confirming the applicant pursued at least one of the qualifying legal remedies against the tenant — a prerequisite process disclosed here, not separately modeled.

fields.name: property1LeaseTypeAndUse
fields.label: Property 1 — lease type and use of the property
fields.description: Column 17 (ΕΙΔΟΣ ΜΙΣΘΩΣΗΣ - ΧΡΗΣΗ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΟΥ): mandatory per page 3 instruction item 7 and FAQ Q2/Q3. The companion FAQ's own Q3 answer lists 67 numbered codes spanning three families — lease/sublease ("Εκμίσθωση"/"Υπεκμίσθωση"), gratuitous grant of use ("Δωρεάν παραχώρηση"), and owner's own use ("Ιδιοχρησιμοποίηση") — plus a vacant ("ΚΕΝΟ") code and several prior-year-arrears and short-term-registry-specific variants. This v1.0.0 scopes to the primary rented-out-to-a-tenant case and models only the 15 core lease/sublease codes below; the free-grant, self-use, vacant, prior-year-arrears, common-area, billboard-space, and short-term-registry-specific lease variants (the source's remaining ~52 codes) are disclosed as out of scope in VERIFICATION.md. Values: lease-hotel = Εκμίσθωση ξενοδοχείων (code 1); lease-clinic = Εκμίσθωση κλινικών (code 2); lease-educational-institution = Εκμίσθωση εκπαιδευτικών ιδρυμάτων (code 3); lease-entertainment-hall = Εκμίσθωση αιθουσών θεαμάτων (code 4); lease-shop = Εκμίσθωση καταστημάτων (code 5); lease-office = Εκμίσθωση γραφείων (code 6); lease-warehouse = Εκμίσθωση αποθηκών κ.τ.λ. (code 7); lease-land = Εκμίσθωση γαιών - γης (code 8); lease-installation-or-structure = Εκμίσθωση εγκαταστάσεων ή κατασκευών (code 9); lease-residence = Εκμίσθωση κατοικιών (code 10); lease-industrial-premises-vat = Εκμίσθωση βιομηχανοστασίων με ΦΠΑ (code 11); lease-shopping-center-vat = Εκμίσθωση εμπορικών κέντρων με ΦΠΑ (code 12); sublease-real-estate = Υπεκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας (code 24); short-term-lease-article-39a = Βραχυχρόνια εκμίσθωση ακινήτων άρθρου 39Α του ν.4172/2013 (code 60); short-term-sublease-article-39a = Βραχυχρόνια υπεκμίσθωση ακινήτων άρθρου 39Α του ν.4172/2013 (code 61).

fields.name: property1ElectricityMeterNumber
fields.label: Property 1 — electricity supply number (ΔΕΗ), first 9 digits
fields.description: Column 18 (Αριθμός Παροχής Ρεύματος, 9 πρώτα ψηφία): mandatory per page 3 instruction item 8, regardless of whether power is currently connected or the property is vacant. Per the companion FAQ (Q8/Q9), auxiliary spaces or land plots without their own meter, sharing a common meter, use the placeholder value "999999999".

fields.name: property1LeaseInfoDeclarationNumber
fields.label: Property 1 — Declaration of Lease Information registration number
fields.description: Column 19 (Αριθμός δήλωσης πληροφοριακών στοιχείων μίσθωσης ακίνητης περιουσίας): the registration number of the separate, companion "Declaration of Lease Information" (Δήλωση Πληροφοριακών Στοιχείων Μίσθωσης Ακίνητης Περιουσίας) e-filing that most residential/commercial leases must be registered under before this Ε2 is filed. Per the companion FAQ (Q6), it is completed for leases filed through that electronic system, and (per the source) is additionally mandatory for the four short-term-registry lease-type codes this v1.0.0 excludes from propertyNLeaseTypeAndUse — left optional here since none of the in-scope lease-type codes carry that stated mandatory linkage.

fields.name: property2ElectricityMeterNumber
fields.label: Property 2 — electricity supply number (ΔΕΗ), first 9 digits
fields.description: Column 18 (Αριθμός Παροχής Ρεύματος, 9 πρώτα ψηφία): mandatory per page 3 instruction item 8, regardless of whether power is currently connected or the property is vacant. Per the companion FAQ (Q8/Q9), auxiliary spaces or land plots without their own meter, sharing a common meter, use the placeholder value "999999999".

fields.name: property2LeaseInfoDeclarationNumber
fields.label: Property 2 — Declaration of Lease Information registration number
fields.description: Column 19 (Αριθμός δήλωσης πληροφοριακών στοιχείων μίσθωσης ακίνητης περιουσίας): the registration number of the separate, companion "Declaration of Lease Information" (Δήλωση Πληροφοριακών Στοιχείων Μίσθωσης Ακίνητης Περιουσίας) e-filing that most residential/commercial leases must be registered under before this Ε2 is filed. Per the companion FAQ (Q6), it is completed for leases filed through that electronic system, and (per the source) is additionally mandatory for the four short-term-registry lease-type codes this v1.0.0 excludes from propertyNLeaseTypeAndUse — left optional here since none of the in-scope lease-type codes carry that stated mandatory linkage.

fields.name: property3Location
fields.label: Property 3 — location (address / village-area-postal code)
fields.description: Column 2 (ΤΟΠΟΘΕΣΙΑ): the leased property's street name and number and city, or village/area and postal code. One row of the main analytical rent statement (ΑΝΑΛΥΤΙΚΗ ΚΑΤΑΣΤΑΣΗ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑΤΩΝ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΗΣ ΠΕΡΙΟΥΣΙΑΣ) represents one leased property/tenant/lease-period combination.

fields.name: property3FloorPosition
fields.label: Property 3 — floor / position
fields.description: Column 3 (ΘΕΣΗ): the property's floor or position within the building, e.g. ground floor (ισόγειο), 1st floor, 2nd floor, etc.

fields.name: property3Category
fields.label: Property 3 — category
fields.description: Column 4 (ΚΑΤΗΓ.): the property's category per the source's own illustrative, non-exhaustive list — residence (οικία), single-family home (μονοκατοικία), apartment (διαμέρισμα), shop (κατάστημα), office (γραφείο), plot (οικόπεδο), warehouse (αποθήκη), parking space (χώρος στάθμευσης), land (γαία), etc. (page 3, instruction item 6). fields.name: property3AreaSqm
fields.label: Property 3 — area (square metres)
fields.description: Column 5 (ΕΠΙΦΑΝ. σε τ.μ.): the property's floor area in square metres.

fields.name: property3TenantName
fields.label: Property 3 — tenant name / company name
fields.description: Column 6 (ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΤΗ — Ονοματεπώνυμο/Επωνυμία): the tenant's full name (natural person) or company name (legal person/entity) leasing this property.

fields.name: property3TenantTin
fields.label: Property 3 — tenant ΑΦΜ (Tax Identification Number)
fields.description: Column 7 (Αριθμός Φορολογικού Μητρώου — ΑΦΜ): the tenant's 9-digit Greek Tax Identification Number.

fields.name: property3LeaseFrom
fields.label: Property 3 — lease period within tax year 2025, from
fields.description: Column 8 (ΔΙΑΡΚΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΗΣ ΣΤΟ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ 2025 — ΑΠΟ): the start date, within tax year 2025, of the lease period this row covers.

fields.name: property3LeaseTo
fields.label: Property 3 — lease period within tax year 2025, to
fields.description: Column 9 (ΔΙΑΡΚΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΗΣ ΣΤΟ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ 2025 — ΕΩΣ): the end date, within tax year 2025, of the lease period this row covers.

fields.name: property3LeaseMonths
fields.label: Property 3 — lease duration (months)
fields.description: Column 10 (ΜΗΝΕΣ αριθ.): the number of months of the lease period, within tax year 2025, that this row covers.

fields.name: property3MonthlyRent
fields.label: Property 3 — monthly rent (actual or notional)
fields.description: Column 11 (ΠΡΑΓΜΑΤΙΚΟ Ή ΤΕΚΜΑΡΤΟ ΜΗΝΙΑΙΟ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑ): the actual or notional (τεκμαρτό) monthly rent. Per the companion FAQ (Q13), completion of this column is mandatory or not depending on which code is chosen in propertyNLeaseTypeAndUse (e.g. not applicable to a vacant property) — this cross-field condition is disclosed here rather than encoded, since it would require mapping every lease-type code to a rent-applicability flag, out of scope for this v1.0.0.

fields.name: property3CoOwnershipPercent

fields.name: property3GrossIncomeLease
fields.label: Property 3 — gross income from lease/sublease
fields.description: Column 13 (Εκμίσθωση - υπεκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας): the gross (real or notional) income attributable to the filer from leasing or subleasing this property. Per page 3, instruction item 10, the specific gross-income column populated (13, 14, or 15) depends on the property's lease type/use; this v1.0.0 scopes to the rented-out-to-a-tenant case and therefore models only column 13 (see VERIFICATION.md for the disclosed exclusion of columns 14/15).

fields.name: property3GrossIncomeUncollected

fields.description: Column 16 (Ανείσπρακτα εισοδήματα από εκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας): rent that accrued but was not collected. fields.sourceRef: Page 1, column 11 (ΠΡΑΓΜΑΤΙΚΟ Ή ΤΕΚΜΑΡΤΟ ΜΗΝΙΑΙΟ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑ); FAQ Q13

fields.name: property5CoOwnershipPercent
fields.label: Property 5 — co-ownership percentage
fields.description: Column 12 (ΠΟΣΟΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΙΔ/ΣΙΑΣ %): the filer's co-ownership/co-usufruct percentage share of the property, if not sole owner. Per page 3, instruction item 5, the gross-income columns record only the amount proportional to this share.

fields.name: property5GrossIncomeLease
fields.label: Property 5 — gross income from lease/sublease
fields.description: Column 13 (Εκμίσθωση - υπεκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας): the gross (real or notional) income attributable to the filer from leasing or subleasing this property. Per page 3, instruction item 10, the specific gross-income column populated (13, 14, or 15) depends on the property's lease type/use; this v1.0.0 scopes to the rented-out-to-a-tenant case and therefore models only column 13 (see VERIFICATION.md for the disclosed exclusion of columns 14/15).

fields.name: property5GrossIncomeUncollected
fields.label: Property 5 — uncollected income from leasing
fields.description: Column 16 (Ανείσπρακτα εισοδήματα από εκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας): rent that accrued but was not collected. Per the companion FAQ (Q4), this may only be declared once the tax office has issued a decision under Article 39 §4 ν.4172/2013 (per circulars ΠΟΛ.1024/2016, ΠΟΛ.1102/2016, and Α.1062/2026) confirming the applicant pursued at least one of the qualifying legal remedies against the tenant — a prerequisite process disclosed here, not separately modeled.

fields.name: property5LeaseTypeAndUse
fields.label: Property 5 — lease type and use of the property
fields.description: Column 17 (ΕΙΔΟΣ ΜΙΣΘΩΣΗΣ - ΧΡΗΣΗ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΟΥ): mandatory per page 3 instruction item 7 and FAQ Q2/Q3. The companion FAQ's own Q3 answer lists 67 numbered codes spanning three families — lease/sublease ("Εκμίσθωση"/"Υπεκμίσθωση"), gratuitous grant of use ("Δωρεάν παραχώρηση"), and owner's own use ("Ιδιοχρησιμοποίηση") — plus a vacant ("ΚΕΝΟ") code and several prior-year-arrears and short-term-registry-specific variants. This v1.0.0 scopes to the primary rented-out-to-a-tenant case and models only the 15 core lease/sublease codes below; the free-grant, self-use, vacant, prior-year-arrears, common-area, billboard-space, and short-term-registry-specific lease variants (the source's remaining ~52 codes) are disclosed as out of scope in VERIFICATION.md. Values: lease-hotel = Εκμίσθωση ξενοδοχείων (code 1); lease-clinic = Εκμίσθωση κλινικών (code 2); lease-educational-institution = Εκμίσθωση εκπαιδευτικών ιδρυμάτων (code 3); lease-entertainment-hall = Εκμίσθωση αιθουσών θεαμάτων (code 4); lease-shop = Εκμίσθωση καταστημάτων (code 5); lease-office = Εκμίσθωση γραφείων (code 6); lease-warehouse = Εκμίσθωση αποθηκών κ.τ.λ. (code 7); lease-land = Εκμίσθωση γαιών - γης (code 8); lease-installation-or-structure = Εκμίσθωση εγκαταστάσεων ή κατασκευών (code 9); lease-residence = Εκμίσθωση κατοικιών (code 10); lease-industrial-premises-vat = Εκμίσθωση βιομηχανοστασίων με ΦΠΑ (code 11); lease-shopping-center-vat = Εκμίσθωση εμπορικών κέντρων με ΦΠΑ (code 12); sublease-real-estate = Υπεκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας (code 24); short-term-lease-article-39a = Βραχυχρόνια εκμίσθωση ακινήτων άρθρου 39Α του ν.4172/2013 (code 60); short-term-sublease-article-39a = Βραχυχρόνια υπεκμίσθωση ακινήτων άρθρου 39Α του ν.4172/2013 (code 61).

fields.name: property5ElectricityMeterNumber
fields.label: Property 5 — electricity supply number (ΔΕΗ), first 9 digits
fields.description: Column 18 (Αριθμός Παροχής Ρεύματος, 9 πρώτα ψηφία): mandatory per page 3 instruction item 8, regardless of whether power is currently connected or the property is vacant. Per the companion FAQ (Q8/Q9), auxiliary spaces or land plots without their own meter, sharing a common meter, use the placeholder value "999999999".

fields.name: property5LeaseInfoDeclarationNumber
fields.label: Property 5 — Declaration of Lease Information registration number
fields.description: Column 19 (Αριθμός δήλωσης πληροφοριακών στοιχείων μίσθωσης ακίνητης περιουσίας): the registration number of the separate, companion "Declaration of Lease Information" (Δήλωση Πληροφοριακών Στοιχείων Μίσθωσης Ακίνητης Περιουσίας) e-filing that most residential/commercial leases must be registered under before this Ε2 is filed. Per the companion FAQ (Q6), it is completed for leases filed through that electronic system, and (per the source) is additionally mandatory for the four short-term-registry lease-type codes this v1.0.0 excludes from propertyNLeaseTypeAndUse — left optional here since none of the in-scope lease-type codes carry that stated mandatory linkage.

fields.name: property6Location
fields.label: Property 6 — location (address / village-area-postal code)
fields.description: Column 2 (ΤΟΠΟΘΕΣΙΑ): the leased property's street name and number and city, or village/area and postal code. One row of the main analytical rent statement (ΑΝΑΛΥΤΙΚΗ ΚΑΤΑΣΤΑΣΗ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑΤΩΝ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΗΣ ΠΕΡΙΟΥΣΙΑΣ) represents one leased property/tenant/lease-period combination.

fields.name: property6FloorPosition
fields.label: Property 6 — floor / position
fields.description: Column 3 (ΘΕΣΗ): the property's floor or position within the building, e.g. ground floor (ισόγειο), 1st floor, 2nd floor, etc.

fields.name: property6Category
fields.label: Property 6 — category
fields.description: Column 4 (ΚΑΤΗΓ.): the property's category per the source's own illustrative, non-exhaustive list — residence (οικία), single-family home (μονοκατοικία), apartment (διαμέρισμα), shop (κατάστημα), office (γραφείο), plot (οικόπεδο), warehouse (αποθήκη), parking space (χώρος στάθμευσης), land (γαία), etc. (page 3, instruction item 6). Modeled as free text since the source's own list is illustrative ("κ.λπ." / "etc."), not a closed code list.

fields.name: property6AreaSqm
fields.label: Property 6 — area (square metres)
fields.description: Column 5 (ΕΠΙΦΑΝ. σε τ.μ.): the property's floor area in square metres.

fields.name: property6TenantName
fields.label: Property 6 — tenant name / company name
fields.description: Column 6 (ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΤΗ — Ονοματεπώνυμο/Επωνυμία): the tenant's full name (natural person) or company name (legal person/entity) leasing this property.

fields.name: property6TenantTin
fields.label: Property 6 — tenant ΑΦΜ (Tax Identification Number)
fields.description: Column 7 (Αριθμός Φορολογικού Μητρώου — ΑΦΜ): the tenant's 9-digit Greek Tax Identification Number.

fields.name: property6LeaseFrom
fields.label: Property 6 — lease period within tax year 2025, from
fields.description: Column 8 (ΔΙΑΡΚΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΗΣ ΣΤΟ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ 2025 — ΑΠΟ): the start date, within tax year 2025, of the lease period this row covers.

fields.name: property6LeaseTo
fields.label: Property 6 — lease period within tax year 2025, to
fields.description: Column 9 (ΔΙΑΡΚΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΗΣ ΣΤΟ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ 2025 — ΕΩΣ): the end date, within tax year 2025, of the lease period this row covers.

fields.name: property6LeaseMonths
fields.label: Property 6 — lease duration (months)
fields.description: Column 10 (ΜΗΝΕΣ αριθ.): the number of months of the lease period, within tax year 2025, that this row covers.

fields.name: property6MonthlyRent
fields.label: Property 6 — monthly rent (actual or notional)
fields.description: Column 11 (ΠΡΑΓΜΑΤΙΚΟ Ή ΤΕΚΜΑΡΤΟ ΜΗΝΙΑΙΟ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑ): the actual or notional (τεκμαρτό) monthly rent. fields.description: Column 4 (ΚΑΤΗΓ.): the property's category per the source's own illustrative, non-exhaustive list — residence (οικία), single-family home (μονοκατοικία), apartment (διαμέρισμα), shop (κατάστημα), office (γραφείο), plot (οικόπεδο), warehouse (αποθήκη), parking space (χώρος στάθμευσης), land (γαία), etc. (page 3, instruction item 6). Modeled as free text since the source's own list is illustrative ("κ.λπ." / "etc."), not a closed code list.

fields.name: property8AreaSqm
fields.label: Property 8 — area (square metres)
fields.description: Column 5 (ΕΠΙΦΑΝ. σε τ.μ.): the property's floor area in square metres.

fields.name: property8TenantName
fields.label: Property 8 — tenant name / company name
fields.description: Column 6 (ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΤΗ — Ονοματεπώνυμο/Επωνυμία): the tenant's full name (natural person) or company name (legal person/entity) leasing this property.

fields.name: property8TenantTin
fields.label: Property 8 — tenant ΑΦΜ (Tax Identification Number)
fields.description: Column 7 (Αριθμός Φορολογικού Μητρώου — ΑΦΜ): the tenant's 9-digit Greek Tax Identification Number.

fields.name: property8LeaseFrom
fields.label: Property 8 — lease period within tax year 2025, from
fields.description: Column 8 (ΔΙΑΡΚΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΗΣ ΣΤΟ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ 2025 — ΑΠΟ): the start date, within tax year 2025, of the lease period this row covers.

fields.name: property8LeaseTo
fields.label: Property 8 — lease period within tax year 2025, to
fields.description: Column 9 (ΔΙΑΡΚΕΙΑ ΕΝΟΙΚΙΑΣΗΣ ΣΤΟ ΦΟΡΟΛΟΓΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ 2025 — ΕΩΣ): the end date, within tax year 2025, of the lease period this row covers.

fields.name: property8LeaseMonths
fields.label: Property 8 — lease duration (months)
fields.description: Column 10 (ΜΗΝΕΣ αριθ.): the number of months of the lease period, within tax year 2025, that this row covers.

fields.name: property8MonthlyRent
fields.label: Property 8 — monthly rent (actual or notional)
fields.description: Column 11 (ΠΡΑΓΜΑΤΙΚΟ Ή ΤΕΚΜΑΡΤΟ ΜΗΝΙΑΙΟ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑ): the actual or notional (τεκμαρτό) monthly rent. Per the companion FAQ (Q13), completion of this column is mandatory or not depending on which code is chosen in propertyNLeaseTypeAndUse (e.g. not applicable to a vacant property) — this cross-field condition is disclosed here rather than encoded, since it would require mapping every lease-type code to a rent-applicability flag, out of scope for this v1.0.0.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, column 11 (ΠΡΑΓΜΑΤΙΚΟ Ή ΤΕΚΜΑΡΤΟ ΜΗΝΙΑΙΟ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑ); FAQ Q13

fields.name: property8CoOwnershipPercent
fields.label: Property 8 — co-ownership percentage
fields.description: Column 12 (ΠΟΣΟΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΙΔ/ΣΙΑΣ %): the filer's co-ownership/co-usufruct percentage share of the property, if not sole owner. Per page 3, instruction item 5, the gross-income columns record only the amount proportional to this share.

fields.name: property8GrossIncomeLease
fields.label: Property 8 — gross income from lease/sublease
fields.description: Column 13 (Εκμίσθωση - υπεκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας): the gross (real or notional) income attributable to the filer from leasing or subleasing this property. Per page 3, instruction item 10, the specific gross-income column populated (13, 14, or 15) depends on the property's lease type/use; this v1.0.0 scopes to the rented-out-to-a-tenant case and therefore models only column 13 (see VERIFICATION.md for the disclosed exclusion of columns 14/15).

fields.name: property8GrossIncomeUncollected
fields.label: Property 8 — uncollected income from leasing
fields.description: Column 16 (Ανείσπρακτα εισοδήματα από εκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας): rent that accrued but was not collected. Per the companion FAQ (Q4), this may only be declared once the tax office has issued a decision under Article 39 §4 ν.4172/2013 (per circulars ΠΟΛ.1024/2016, ΠΟΛ.1102/2016, and Α.1062/2026) confirming the applicant pursued at least one of the qualifying legal remedies against the tenant — a prerequisite process disclosed here, not separately modeled.

fields.name: property8LeaseTypeAndUse
fields.label: Property 8 — lease type and use of the property
fields.description: Column 17 (ΕΙΔΟΣ ΜΙΣΘΩΣΗΣ - ΧΡΗΣΗ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΟΥ): mandatory per page 3 instruction item 7 and FAQ Q2/Q3. The companion FAQ's own Q3 answer lists 67 numbered codes spanning three families — lease/sublease ("Εκμίσθωση"/"Υπεκμίσθωση"), gratuitous grant of use ("Δωρεάν παραχώρηση"), and owner's own use ("Ιδιοχρησιμοποίηση") — plus a vacant ("ΚΕΝΟ") code and several prior-year-arrears and short-term-registry-specific variants. This v1.0.0 scopes to the primary rented-out-to-a-tenant case and models only the 15 core lease/sublease codes below; the free-grant, self-use, vacant, prior-year-arrears, common-area, billboard-space, and short-term-registry-specific lease variants (the source's remaining ~52 codes) are disclosed as out of scope in VERIFICATION.md. Values: lease-hotel = Εκμίσθωση ξενοδοχείων (code 1); lease-clinic = Εκμίσθωση κλινικών (code 2); lease-educational-institution = Εκμίσθωση εκπαιδευτικών ιδρυμάτων (code 3); lease-entertainment-hall = Εκμίσθωση αιθουσών θεαμάτων (code 4); lease-shop = Εκμίσθωση καταστημάτων (code 5); lease-office = Εκμίσθωση γραφείων (code 6); lease-warehouse = Εκμίσθωση αποθηκών κ.τ.λ. (code 7); lease-land = Εκμίσθωση γαιών - γης (code 8); lease-installation-or-structure = Εκμίσθωση εγκαταστάσεων ή κατασκευών (code 9); lease-residence = Εκμίσθωση κατοικιών (code 10); lease-industrial-premises-vat = Εκμίσθωση βιομηχανοστασίων με ΦΠΑ (code 11); lease-shopping-center-vat = Εκμίσθωση εμπορικών κέντρων με ΦΠΑ (code 12); sublease-real-estate = Υπεκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας (code 24); short-term-lease-article-39a = Βραχυχρόνια εκμίσθωση ακινήτων άρθρου 39Α του ν.4172/2013 (code 60); short-term-sublease-article-39a = Βραχυχρόνια υπεκμίσθωση ακινήτων άρθρου 39Α του ν.4172/2013 (code 61).

fields.name: property8ElectricityMeterNumber
fields.label: Property 8 — electricity supply number (ΔΕΗ), first 9 digits
fields.description: Column 18 (Αριθμός Παροχής Ρεύματος, 9 πρώτα ψηφία): mandatory per page 3 instruction item 8, regardless of whether power is currently connected or the property is vacant. Per the companion FAQ (Q8/Q9), auxiliary spaces or land plots without their own meter, sharing a common meter, use the placeholder value "999999999".

fields.name: property8LeaseInfoDeclarationNumber
fields.label: Property 8 — Declaration of Lease Information registration number
fields.description: Column 19 (Αριθμός δήλωσης πληροφοριακών στοιχείων μίσθωσης ακίνητης περιουσίας): the registration number of the separate, companion "Declaration of Lease Information" (Δήλωση Πληροφοριακών Στοιχείων Μίσθωσης Ακίνητης Περιουσίας) e-filing that most residential/commercial leases must be registered under before this Ε2 is filed. Per the companion FAQ (Q6), it is completed for leases filed through that electronic system, and (per the source) is additionally mandatory for the four short-term-registry lease-type codes this v1.0.0 excludes from propertyNLeaseTypeAndUse — left optional here since none of the in-scope lease-type codes carry that stated mandatory linkage.

fields.name: property9Location
fields.label: Property 9 — location (address / village-area-postal code)
fields.description: Column 2 (ΤΟΠΟΘΕΣΙΑ): the leased property's street name and number and city, or village/area and postal code. One row of the main analytical rent statement (ΑΝΑΛΥΤΙΚΗ ΚΑΤΑΣΤΑΣΗ ΜΙΣΘΩΜΑΤΩΝ ΑΚΙΝΗΤΗΣ ΠΕΡΙΟΥΣΙΑΣ) represents one leased property/tenant/lease-period combination.

(code 7); lease-land = Εκμίσθωση γαιών - γης (code 8); lease-installation-or-structure = Εκμίσθωση εγκαταστάσεων ή κατασκευών (code 9); lease-residence = Εκμίσθωση κατοικιών (code 10); lease-industrial-premises-vat = Εκμίσθωση βιομηχανοστασίων με ΦΠΑ (code 11); lease-shopping-center-vat = Εκμίσθωση εμπορικών κέντρων με ΦΠΑ (code 12); sublease-real-estate = Υπεκμίσθωση ακίνητης περιουσίας (code 24); short-term-lease-article-39a = Βραχυχρόνια εκμίσθωση ακινήτων άρθρου 39Α του ν.4172/2013 (code 60); short-term-sublease-article-39a = Βραχυχρόνια υπεκμίσθωση ακινήτων άρθρου 39Α του ν.4172/2013 (code 61).

fields.name: property10ElectricityMeterNumber
fields.label: Property 10 — electricity supply number (ΔΕΗ), first 9 digits
fields.description: Column 18 (Αριθμός Παροχής Ρεύματος, 9 πρώτα ψηφία): mandatory per page 3 instruction item 8, regardless of whether power is currently connected or the property is vacant. Per the companion FAQ (Q8/Q9), auxiliary spaces or land plots without their own meter, sharing a common meter, use the placeholder value "999999999".

fields.name: property10LeaseInfoDeclarationNumber
fields.label: Property 10 — Declaration of Lease Information registration number
fields.description: Column 19 (Αριθμός δήλωσης πληροφοριακών στοιχείων μίσθωσης ακίνητης περιουσίας): the registration number of the separate, companion "Declaration of Lease Information" (Δήλωση Πληροφοριακών Στοιχείων Μίσθωσης Ακίνητης Περιουσίας) e-filing that most residential/commercial leases must be registered under before this Ε2 is filed. Per the companion FAQ (Q6), it is completed for leases filed through that electronic system, and (per the source) is additionally mandatory for the four short-term-registry lease-type codes this v1.0.0 excludes from propertyNLeaseTypeAndUse — left optional here since none of the in-scope lease-type codes carry that stated mandatory linkage.
